general_inquiry.question: Find the jacobian of the vector valued function $\begin{pmatrix} f(x,y,z)\\ g(x,y,z) \\ h(x,y,z)\end{pmatrix}$ where $f(x,y,z) = \cos \left(\frac{x}{z}\right)$, $g(x,y,z) = \cosh (y)$, and $h(x,y,z) = \cos (z)$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The Jacobian matrix of the vector-valued function \( \begin{pmatrix} f(x,y,z)\\ g(x,y,z) \\ h(x,y,z)\end{pmatrix} \), where \( f(x,y,z) = \cos \left(\frac{x}{z}\right) \), \( g(x,y,z) = \cosh(y) \), and \( h(x,y,z) = \cos(z) \), is:

\[
\begin{pmatrix}
-\frac{\sin\left(\frac{x}{z}\right)}{z} & 0 & \frac{x \sin\left(\frac{x}{z}\right)}{z^2} \\
0 & \sinh(y) & 0 \\
0 & 0 & -\sin(z)
\end{pmatrix}
\]
